message:
feat(membrane): add 7 new runtime math controllers and expand existing modules

Adds 7 new advanced runtime math controller modules and significantly extends
the existing runtime_math subsystem:

New modules:
- equivariant.rs (344 lines): Representation-stability and group-action symmetry
  monitor for detecting cross-family semantic drift in math kernel outputs
- changepoint.rs (515 lines): Online changepoint detection for identifying
  distributional shifts in error patterns across math function calls
- commitment_audit.rs (586 lines): Cryptographic commitment audit trail for
  runtime decision verification and post-hoc accountability
- conformal.rs (416 lines): Conformal prediction intervals for runtime
  uncertainty quantification on math kernel outputs
- coupling.rs (460 lines): Optimal transport coupling controller for aligning
  runtime distributions across kernel implementations
- higher_topos.rs (461 lines): Higher-topos-theoretic consistency checker
  for verifying compositional properties of math pipelines
- loss_minimizer.rs (544 lines): Online convex optimization for minimizing
  runtime validation overhead while maintaining safety guarantees

Updated modules:
- mod.rs: +491 lines integrating new controllers into the decision pipeline,
  adding cross-controller communication, and expanding the orchestration layer
- design.rs: +42 lines extending D-optimal probe scheduling with new controller
  feedback integration
- fusion.rs: Minor fix for controller interface compatibility
- sparse.rs: +10 lines adding new controller signal inputs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
